title: Diabetes Medications and Patient Counselling in the Caribbean
description: This course covers the use of diabetes medications and effective patient counselling techniques for pharmacy technicians across the Caribbean region, with a focus on islands like Trinidad & Tobago, Jamaica, Barbados, Guyana, and Belize. It explores the unique disease burden, supply chain challenges, and traditional medicine practices that shape diabetes management in the Caribbean context.
what_youll_learn: Identify the national drug formularies and scheduling systems for key Caribbean countries
Describe the common diabetes medication classes and their mechanisms of action
Apply patient-centered counselling strategies to support diabetes self-management
Recognize potential interactions between diabetes drugs and traditional Caribbean herbal remedies
Develop culturally-appropriate diabetes education materials for diverse Caribbean patient populations
